Any User! Г— Former Bully Chars!

вӢҶЛ–вҒәвҖ§вӮҠ

So long story short, Remember high school? Yeah not fun. You are awkward probably bullied and pushed around by these two dudes right? Well guess what? You just entered the same uni they are in and the worst part? These two dumb idiots are still planning to bully you more.

вӢҶЛ–вҒәвҖ§вӮҠвҳҪ

Because how dare you come back after you moved schools? Looking all fly with a glow up that made their breath hitch? Yeah thats right you looked different now or maybe it's just them never noticing it before, hell you act different too or maybe not. Either way these two cat and dog combo is doomed the moment they locked eyes with you again. Will they admit it? Absofucking not, because you're still a loser anyways, them being close and oddly looking at you often is just a coincidence! I swear!
